pages.text:
GOVERNMENT OF INDIA
Ministry of Home Affairs
CRPF Procurement Wing, New Delhi - 110 001
TENDER NOTICE: TND-2025-0001
Tender Category Medical & Healthcare
Estimated Tender Value Rs. 50,00,000/- (Rupees Fifty Lakhs Only)
Earnest Money Deposit (EMD) Rs. 5,00,000/- (Rupees Five Lakhs Only)
Submission Deadline 30 June 2025, 05:00 PM IST
1. SCOPE OF SUPPLY
Item Description Qty. Minimum Specifications
Ventilator (ICU Grade) 20 Units Invasive/Non-Invasive; FiO2: 21-100%; 4hr Battery; CE/FDA approved.
Defibrillator (Biphasic) 30 Units Biphasic; AED mode; 1-360 J; IP44 rated; 3-year warranty.
Patient Monitor 50 Units 12-inch TFT; ECG, SpO2, NIBP, EtCO2; LAN/Wi-Fi.
2. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
Bidders must satisfy all conditions below to qualify for technical evaluation:
• Turnover: Min. Rs. 2,00,00,000/- per year for the last 3 financial years.
• Experience: Min. 5 years in supply to Govt/PSU/Defence/Hospitals.
• Certification: Valid ISO 13485:2016 (Medical Devices QMS) and CE/FDA/BIS.
• Blacklisting: Must not be blacklisted by any Government Department.
3. EVALUATION METHODOLOGY
Evaluation will follow a Two-Bid System. A minimum technical score of 60/100 is required. The contract will be
awarded to the L1 (Lowest Bidder) among technically qualified firms.
Sh. Rajendra Kumar Sharma, IPS
Deputy Inspector General (Procurement)
CRPF Procurement Wing, New Delhi
Date: May 07, 2026
